V-M-078.scope: Phase-60 verification for premium frontend QA gates across public, auth, protected user, protected admin, Matrix runtime, motion, responsive, performance, accessibility, MyGRACE, and protected-surface boundaries. Phase-65 release-candidate gate remains planned and consumes this evidence later.

module-checks.check-10: Public/auth route matrix covered by Phase-60 static-route proof: /, /login, /register, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-email across the 360/390/430/768/1024/1440 viewport contract plus reduced-motion routes.
module-checks.check-11: Protected user route matrix covered by Phase-60 static-route proof: /dashboard, /dashboard/config, /dashboard/subscription, /dashboard/referrals, /dashboard/settings. Authenticated clean-deploy screenshots remain follow-up evidence.
module-checks.check-12: Admin route matrix covered by Phase-60 static-route proof: /login, /, /users, /devices, /mtproto, /servers, /plans, /analytics. Authenticated clean-deploy screenshots remain follow-up evidence.
module-checks.check-13: Layout assertions passed: no document-level horizontal scroll markers, no visible icon/text/control/status overlap markers, bounded table/list/graph classes, stable fixed-format controls, and no pointer interception by Matrix/canvas/overlay layers.
module-checks.check-14: Performance budgets passed: user JS 448516 bytes gzip 135543, user CSS 40900 bytes gzip 8207, admin JS 780555 bytes gzip 219372, admin CSS 36787 bytes gzip 8148; no unexpected dist asset exceeded Phase-60 limits.
module-checks.check-15: Lighthouse/Web Vitals local preview run was not executed; Phase-60 smoke emitted [PremiumQAGates][phase60][LIGHTHOUSE_UNAVAILABLE] no-local-preview-lighthouse-run and enforced bundle/static budgets instead.
module-checks.check-16: Motion/runtime budget passed: Phase-59 motion tokens stay <= 220 ms for route/feedback transitions, no scroll hijacking, no setInterval-driven decorative loops, Matrix canvas pointer-events-none, reduced-motion fallback, and inactive-tab markers remain present.
module-checks.check-17: Accessibility gates passed by static markers: focus-visible selectors, keyboard focus markers, reduced-motion media emulation, readable button/status/input tokens, no keyboard trap patterns, and no visible instruction-text markers.
module-checks.check-18: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/modules/M-078.xml docs/plans/Phase-60.xml docs/verification/V-M-078.xml
module-checks.check-21: git diff --name-only HEAD -- install.sh docker-compose.yml nginx deploy deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml .env.example backend/app backend/tests mtproto-runtime official-mtproxy telegram-bot is empty

evidence.item: 2026-06-04: frontend and frontend-admin production builds passed.
2026-06-04: scripts/phase60-premium-qa-smoke.mjs passed with all required PremiumQAGates markers.
2026-06-04: Phase-52, Phase-55, Phase-56, Phase-57, Phase-58, and Phase-59 regression smokes passed individually and through the Phase-60 gate.

2026-06-04: Phase-60 static-route proof covers public/auth, protected user, admin, and reduced-motion matrices; authenticated clean-deploy screenshots remain a follow-up because local auth fixtures are not materialized.
2026-06-04: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.

verification-matrix.target-1: User and admin builds compile without TypeScript errors and produce budget-readable dist artifacts.
verification-matrix.target-2: Public/auth static-route proof covers premium Matrix style, visible logo/CTA, readable email-proof copy, canonical tariff preview, no-overlap markers, and reduced-motion fallback markers.
verification-matrix.target-3: Protected user static-route proof covers dashboard/config/subscription/referrals/settings workflows, copy/download/proxy feedback, subscription calendar, device controls, and MTProto redaction markers.
verification-matrix.target-4: Protected admin static-route proof covers dashboard/users/devices/MTProto/analytics/servers/plans workflows, redaction, confirmation guards, bounded inventories, and runtime readonly frames.
verification-matrix.target-5: Bundle size, asset size, Lighthouse fallback, canvas/motion, and route animation budgets are explicit and fail truthfully when unavailable or exceeded.
verification-matrix.target-6: Focus-visible, keyboard reachability markers, reduced-motion, contrast tokens, no pointer interception, no scroll hijack, and no keyboard trap patterns are enforced.
verification-matrix.target-7: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, regression smokes, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard pass before Phase-60 is marked done-local.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: A local QA run produces deterministic build, smoke, screenshot/static-route, performance, accessibility, MyGRACE, and protected-surface evidence for Phase-53 through Phase-59 premium frontend work.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: When authenticated fixtures are unavailable, Phase-60 evidence clearly says which protected screenshots are static-route proof and which clean-deploy screenshots remain follow-up.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Performance and motion budgets are conservative enough for current user/admin bundles while strict enough to catch accidental bloat, long animations, blank canvas, or pointer-intercepting overlays.
success-scenarios.scenario-4: Regression smoke confirms Phase-52/55/56/57/58/59 contracts still pass under the unified QA gate.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Any target viewport shows horizontal scroll, text/control/status overlap, hidden CTA/action, unreadable form/table/chart, blank Matrix canvas, or broken reduced-motion fallback.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Phase-60 smoke claims authenticated screenshot coverage without a real authenticated fixture or clean-deploy evidence.
failure-scenarios.failure-3: Bundle, asset, Lighthouse/Web Vitals, canvas, or motion budgets are missing, unavailable without explicit fallback, or exceeded without a recorded blocker.
failure-scenarios.failure-4: Keyboard traversal cannot reach nav/actions/forms/tabs/dialogs, focus-visible is hidden, or any modal/confirmation traps focus incorrectly.
failure-scenarios.failure-5: Smoke output, screenshots, console captures, or docs expose MTProto secrets, full proxy links, VPN config contents, bearer/refresh/reset/verify tokens, real emails, raw IP exports, payment/provider identifiers, database URLs, or API keys.
failure-scenarios.failure-6: Phase-60 modifies backend API, auth/session, billing catalog, VPN/MTProto runtime, deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose, telegram-bot, or secret-handling surfaces.

telemetry-requirements.requirement-1: Allowed output: route names, viewport names, selector names, synthetic fixture IDs, screenshot file paths, bundle byte/gzip sizes, Lighthouse category scores, Web Vitals numbers, budget names, unavailable-tool reason, and pass/fail markers.
telemetry-requirements.requirement-2: Forbidden output: MTProto ee secrets, full tg:// or https://t.me proxy links, WireGuard/AWG config contents, bearer/refresh/reset/verify tokens, real user/admin emails, raw IP history exports, payment IDs, YooKassa/Resend keys, database URLs, API keys, private keys, or screenshot binary data.
telemetry-requirements.requirement-3: Screenshots must use synthetic or redacted data only. Live clean-deploy screenshots require operator approval and must not include secrets, raw config, raw IP history exports, or provider keys.

phase-gates.gate-1: M-078 Phase-60 smoke proves screenshot matrix specification, responsive/no-overlap assertions, performance budgets, accessibility/reduced-motion checks, regression smoke wiring, MyGRACE checks, and protected-surface guard.
phase-gates.gate-2: M-009, M-010, M-036, M-037, M-038, M-070, M-071, M-073, M-075, M-076, and M-077 regression smokes remain satisfied after QA gate implementation.
phase-gates.gate-3: User/admin builds, Phase-60 smoke, Phase-52/55/56/57/58/59 smokes, screenshot/static-route evidence, performance/accessibility budgets, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard pass before Phase-60 can be marked done-local.
phase-gates.gate-4: Phase-65 release candidate gate remains planned and must not be marked release-ready by Phase-60 evidence alone.

V-M-078.autonomous-execution-safety: Safe for autonomous local execution if changes stay inside QA scripts, screenshot/performance tooling, package metadata needed to run those scripts, and MyGRACE docs. Stop if execution appears to require backend API changes, auth/session changes, billing catalog mutation, VPN/MTProto runtime changes, deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose changes, telegram-bot changes, production server access, or secret-handling changes.
